Table of Contents

Interface ITableCrawler

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a crawler capable of traversing tables.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("6E943337-D364-4B76-94CC-F7432305A851")]
public interface ITableCrawler

Properties

CrawlerItemType

The type of item returned by the crawler.

esriCrawlerDataSourceType CrawlerItemType { set; }

Property Value

esriCrawlerDataSourceType

Examples

Sample Snippet

GroupField

The name of the field that contains values that identify groups of related items.

string GroupField { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

OrderByGroup

Indicates whether the table crawler orders rows by values in the group name field.

bool OrderByGroup { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryFilter

The query filter associated with the specified 'Table'. Only rows that match the specified filter's criteria are returned by the crawler.

IQueryFilter QueryFilter { get; set; }

Property Value

IQueryFilter

Examples

Sample Snippet

SelectionSet

The selection set as a source of the data to crawl.

ISelectionSet SelectionSet { get; set; }

Property Value

ISelectionSet

Examples

Sample Snippet

SourceField

The name of the field that references the raster dataset.

string SourceField { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Table

The table as a source of the data to crawl.

ITable Table { get; set; }

Property Value

ITable

Examples

Sample Snippet

TimeStampField

The name of the field that contains time stamp value associated with the row.

string TimeStampField { get; set; }

Property Value

string
